name: Auth & Biometrics
description: Secure user authentication including biometric (fingerprint/face) login and PIN setup.

name: User Profile
description: Management of personal health profile, basic information, and preferences.

name: Dashboard
description: Centralized overview of health status, upcoming appointments, and daily summaries.

name: Health Records
description: Comprehensive management of medical history, clinical documents, and FHIR resources.

name: Vitals Monitor
description: Tracking and visualization of vital signs like heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen levels.

name: Medications
description: Tracking of prescribed medications, dosages, and adherence schedules.

name: Appointments
description: Scheduling and management of medical appointments and follow-ups.

name: Reports & Analytics
description: Visual representation of health trends and generated health reports.

name: Medical Standards
description: Integration and mapping of medical terminologies (ICD-10, LOINC, RxNorm, SNOMED).

name: Doctor Verification
description: System for verifying medical credentials and professional status of healthcare providers.

name: Voice Chat
description: On-device AI-powered voice assistant for hands-free interaction.

name: Local Agent
description: Personalized local AI agent that learns from user data while maintaining privacy.

name: Network Sync
description: Infrastructure for peer-to-peer data synchronization across devices.

name: Allergies
description: Management and tracking of known allergies and adverse reactions.

name: Calendar Import
description: Integration with external calendar providers (Gmail, Outlook) to import medical appointments.

name: Health Sharing
description: Secure sharing of health data with trusted individuals or providers via P2P.

name: Governance
description: Mechanisms for network participation, decision-making, and policy updates.

name: Incentives & Rewards
description: Gamification and reward system for healthy habits and network contributions.

name: Meditation
description: Guided offline meditation and breathing exercises for mental well-being.

name: Settings
description: Application configuration, privacy controls, and theme management.

name: Sync Service
description: Background service orchestrating data consistency across multiple platforms.

name: Emergency Data
description: Critical health information accessible in case of emergency (Medical ID).

name: Scraping Config
description: Configuration and adapters for retrieving medical information from various research sources.

name: Proposals
description: Interface for submitting and voting on network improvement proposals.

name: Data Sources
description: Integration layer for diverse health data inputs (sensors, files, external APIs).
